name: @pp/pilot
description: Pair Programmer platform pilot: the in-process lifecycle driver (RunPilot) that replaces pair-programmer's Claude-Code Task-tool orchestration. Drives the 9-phase run lifecycle — triage, profile, taxonomy, stage loop with tier resolution + judge routing + Reflexion ×1, missability, master-plan patch, finalize — over @pp/core state and the @pp/engine runtime.
